## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why? Link to any related issue: Closes #NNN -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `refactor` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `docs` / `chore` / `ci` / `test`
- [ ] Breaking change (`!` suffix or `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit title follows Conventional Commits (`feat: …`, `fix: …`, etc.)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] All CI checks pass locally (`dotnet test`, `dotnet format --verify-no-changes`)
- [ ] Public API changes are documented (XML doc comments)
- [ ] Breaking changes are described below

## Breaking changes

<!-- If this is a breaking change, describe what callers need to update. Delete if not applicable. -->
